channel.title: Pages on Jingyuan
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Jingyuan

item.title: Friend Link Rules
item.description:
This page explains the eligibility, submission methods, and maintenance principles for friend links on this site. Please read the complete rules before applying.

Last updated: July 22, 2026.

Basic Requirements

  • The website should be an accessible personal site or independent blog with a clear name and original content that is still being maintained.
  • Friend links are reciprocal. Add this site to your friend-links page before applying and make sure the link is publicly accessible.
  • It should use HTTPS and must not contain malicious redirects, scams, phishing, malware, or anything else that could put visitors at risk.
  • Sites centered on illegal material, explicit adult content, hate or harassment, piracy, advertising, copied content, or search-ranking manipulation will not be accepted.
  • Your subject, technology stack, traffic, and publishing schedule do not need to match this site. A genuine, complete, and maintained website is enough.

Information to Submit

Please include:

  1. Website name;
  2. Website URL;
  3. A one-line description;
  4. An avatar or site-icon URL;
  5. The URL of the friend-links page where you added this site;
  6. An English name and description, if available.

If no English name or description is supplied, the English friend-links page will preserve the original wording instead of inventing a translation.

How to Apply

Return to the Links page and submit publicly in the comments, or email mr.jingyuan.zheng@gmail.com.

Comments are visible to all visitors. Use email if your message contains anything you do not want to make public. Add this site before applying and include the public friend-links page where the link can be verified. This site will add your link after confirming it.

Review and Maintenance

  • Requests are reviewed manually. Meeting these rules does not guarantee acceptance, and there is no fixed response time.
  • After review, I will reply through the comment thread or email used for the request, whether it is accepted or declined. If declined, I will include the reason, so please watch for a response.
  • Names and descriptions normally use the applicant’s supplied wording. If the text is too long for the card, I may ask for a shorter version.
  • A link may be removed if the site remains unavailable, changes ownership, redirects elsewhere, or no longer meets these rules.
  • If the other site removes this site’s link without notice, its link may also be removed here.
  • You can request an update by comment or email when your URL, name, description, or avatar changes.

This Site’s Friend-Link Details

  • Name: Jingyuan
  • Website: https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io
  • Description: Open-source projects, technology notes, and pieces of everyday life.
  • Avatar: https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/img/avatar.png

Thank you for maintaining your own corner of the web and for considering a link exchange.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
This privacy policy explains how Jingyuan Zheng’s personal website handles visitor information, cookies, advertising, and third-party links.

Last updated: May 26, 2026.

Website Operator

This website is a personal website operated by Jingyuan Zheng and hosted on GitHub Pages.

Contact: mr.jingyuan.zheng@gmail.com

Information This Site Collects

This is a static personal website. I do not run user accounts, payment forms, newsletters, or comment databases on this site.

If you contact me by email, I may receive the information you choose to send, such as your name, email address, and message content. I use that information only to read and respond to your message.

Hosting and Technical Logs

This site is hosted by GitHub Pages. GitHub may process standard technical information such as IP address, browser details, request time, and pages requested in order to provide hosting, security, and abuse prevention. GitHub’s handling of this information is governed by GitHub’s own policies.

Cookies and Local Storage

The site theme may use local browser storage to remember display preferences such as light or dark mode.

This site may also use third-party services that set cookies or similar technologies. These services can include embedded content, external links, site verification tools, analytics, or advertising services.

Advertising and Google AdSense

This site may display Google AdSense ads.

Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on a user’s prior visits to this website or other websites. Google’s use of advertising cookies enables Google and its partners to serve ads based on visits to this site and other sites on the Internet.

Users may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings. Users may also visit www.aboutads.info to learn more about choices for personalized advertising from participating third-party vendors.

If other third-party ad networks are used in the future, this policy will be updated to identify them where appropriate.

European Users and Consent

For visitors in the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, or Switzerland, this site may show a consent message before using advertising cookies or personalized advertising features where consent is required.

If Google AdSense is enabled, consent choices may be managed through Google’s Privacy & messaging tools or another Google-certified consent management platform.

Third-Party Links and Embedded Content

Articles may link to external websites such as GitHub, government websites, documentation pages, social platforms, or software project pages. External websites are controlled by their own operators and are not covered by this privacy policy.

Embedded or linked third-party content may collect data according to the third party’s own privacy policy.

Children’s Privacy

This site is intended for a general audience and is not directed at children. I do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

Changes to This Policy

I may update this policy when the site changes or when legal, hosting, analytics, or advertising requirements change. The latest version will be published on this page.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Under Maintenance

My personal CV is temporarily unavailable while I update it. Please check back soon.

item.title: Links
item.description:
Find Me Elsewhere

These are the platforms where I share open-source work, technical notes, and pieces of everyday life.
